prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-PHSMDW-16-BLCK Product Type: METAL_DETECTOR Brand (from catalog): ASR Tactical Existing Title: ASR Tactical Professional Handheld Security Metal Detector Wand Description: Locate metal easily with the ASR Tactical Handheld Security Metal Detector.

This professional metal detector is designed with security in mind. The speaker will sounds when metal is detected, and it features a 2 mode toggle switch: ON (always on) and LOW/ON (momentary and low sensitivity to help save the battery).

The green READY LED will indicate when the unit is on, and the red ALERT LED will light up when metal is detected. There is also a sensitivity screw (SENS) that will allow you to adjust the strength.

This detector requires a 9V battery (not included) and also features a 3.5mm headphone jack for noisy environments. It is about 16" long and has a 360 degree detection area.

This is a great tool for law enforcement, security officers and people who enjoy metal detection as a hobby. Search Terms: metal detecting security law enforcement police tools personal Features: - Overall Dimensions: 16" x 3.5" x 1.5" - 2 Mode Toggle Switch: ON (Always On) | LOW/ON (Momentary and Low Sensitivity) - 3.5mm Headphone Jack for Noisy Environments - 360 Degree Detection Area - 9V Battery Required (Not Included) === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Tactical 16in Black Professional Handheld Metal Detector
